chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-197 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 05-11-2025. Mr. Nasir Ahmed Khan advocate for the petitioner a/w petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G a/w Inspector Ghulam Mujtaba SHO P.S Kensar. = Petitioner seeks protection as he states that official respondents at the instance of private persons are causing harassment to him. Pursuant to court’s notice, D.I.G Mirpurkhas, S.S.P Tharparkar @ Mithi and S.H.O P.S Khensar have filed their replies, wherein stated that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioner and the dispute is private in nature; however, they undertake to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law as and when required. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal in view of statements filed by the official respondents. Hence instant petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner and to provide protection to him in accordance with law. JUDGE *Saleem*
